notes: ARCHIVAL FIXTURE — all 5 events are from September-October 2020. These ARE listed in expected_events deliberately. The extractor's job is extraction, not temporal filtering: surfacing past events is correct behavior. Downstream pipeline (enrichment + explore_items ranker) handles hiding events whose starts_at is in the past. Test recall/precision should treat these as valid expectations. Page is page 1 of paginated /events/ archive. Each event is a WordPress <article class="... event type-event ..."> with an <h2 class="entry-title"> for the title and a <span class="published"> for the date, followed by a free-text snippet containing the start/end time in DD/MM/YYYY format (e.g. '26/09/2020 2:00 pm - 5:00 pm'). All 5 are single-occurrence live-music sets in the tasting room (2:00 pm - 5:00 pm America/New_York). Smart-quote apostrophes (U+2019) appear as literal '’' chars, not as ’ entities.
